gitignore v0.1.4.9000
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • Introduction
  • Changelog

Fetch available templates from gitignore.io

Source: R/gi_available_templates.R
gi_available_templates.Rd

This return list of all templates supported by gitignore.io.

gi_available_templates()

Value

A character with all templates supported by gitignore.io.

Details

The returned list is returned as lower case characters.

Examples

gi_available_templates()

#>   [1] "1c"                          "1c-bitrix"                  
#>   [3] "a-frame"                     "actionscript"               
#>   [5] "ada"                         "adobe"                      
#>   [7] "advancedinstaller"           "adventuregamestudio"        
#>   [9] "agda"                        "al"                         
#>  [11] "alteraquartusii"             "altium"                     
#>  [13] "amplify"                     "android"                    
#>  [15] "androidstudio"               "angular"                    
#>  [17] "anjuta"                      "ansible"                    
#>  [19] "apachecordova"               "apachehadoop"               
#>  [21] "appbuilder"                  "appceleratortitanium"       
#>  [23] "appcode"                     "appcode+all"                
#>  [25] "appcode+iml"                 "appengine"                  
#>  [27] "aptanastudio"                "arcanist"                   
#>  [29] "archive"                     "archives"                   
#>  [31] "archlinuxpackages"           "aspnetcore"                 
#>  [33] "assembler"                   "ate"                        
#>  [35] "atmelstudio"                 "ats"                        
#>  [37] "audio"                       "automationstudio"           
#>  [39] "autotools"                   "autotools+strict"           
#>  [41] "awr"                         "azurefunctions"             
#>  [43] "backup"                      "ballerina"                  
#>  [45] "basercms"                    "basic"                      
#>  [47] "batch"                       "bazaar"                     
#>  [49] "bazel"                       "bitrise"                    
#>  [51] "bitrix"                      "bittorrent"                 
#>  [53] "blackbox"                    "bloop"                      
#>  [55] "bluej"                       "bookdown"                   
#>  [57] "bower"                       "bricxcc"                    
#>  [59] "buck"                        "c"                          
#>  [61] "c++"                         "cake"                       
#>  [63] "cakephp"                     "cakephp2"                   
#>  [65] "cakephp3"                    "calabash"                   
#>  [67] "carthage"                    "certificates"               
#>  [69] "ceylon"                      "cfwheels"                   
#>  [71] "chefcookbook"                "chocolatey"                 
#>  [73] "clean"                       "clion"                      
#>  [75] "clion+all"                   "clion+iml"                  
#>  [77] "clojure"                     "cloud9"
